untranslatable_reason: Measured Move Up pattern requires identification of multi-phase structure (impulse move, corrective phase, measured extension), precise corrective phase retracement level, and comparison of current price to MMU low. This requires pattern-specific logic beyond standard indicator thresholds. The 'analysis begins after pattern ends' and evaluation of 'price position relative to corrective phase' cannot be expressed with available point-in-time indicators without explicit pattern detection framework.
